members.name: nextBoolean
members.javadoc: /** * Returns the next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed * boolean value from this random number generator's * sequence. * * @return the next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed * boolean value from this random number generator's * sequence */

tags.content: next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed boolean value from this random number generator's sequence

members.name: nextBytes
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Generates random bytes and places them into a user-supplied
 * byte array.  The number of random bytes produced is equal to
 * the length of the byte array.
 *
 * @param bytes the non-null byte array in which to put the
 * random bytes
 */

tags.name: bytes
tags.content: the non-null byte array in which to put the random bytes

members.name: nextDouble
members.javadoc: /** * Returns the next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed * double value between 0.0 and * 1.0 from this random number generator's sequence. * * @return the next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed * double value between 0.0 and * 1.0 from this random number generator's sequence */

tags.content: next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed double value between 0.0 and 1.0 from this random number generator's sequence
tags.description: the next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed double value between 0.0 and 1.0 from this random number generator's sequence.

members.name: nextFloat
members.javadoc: /** * Returns the next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed float * value between 0.0 and 1.0 from this random * number generator's sequence. * * @return the next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed float * value between 0.0 and 1.0 from this * random number generator's sequence */

tags.content: next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed float value between 0.0 and 1.0 from this random number generator's sequence

members.name: nextGaussian
members.javadoc: /** * Returns the next pseudorandom, Gaussian ("normally") distributed * double value with mean 0.0 and standard * deviation 1.0 from this random number generator's sequence. * * @return the next pseudorandom, Gaussian ("normally") distributed * double value with mean 0.0 and * standard deviation 1.0 from this random number * generator's sequence */

members.name: nextInt
members.javadoc: /** * Returns the next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed int * value from this random number generator's sequence. * All 232 possible {@code int} values * should be produced with (approximately) equal probability. * * @return the next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed int * value from this random number generator's sequence */

tags.content: next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed int value from this random number generator's sequence
tags.description: Returns the next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed int value from this random number generator's sequence.

members.name: nextInt
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Returns a pseudorandom, uniformly distributed {@code int} value
 * between 0 (inclusive) and the specified value (exclusive), drawn from
 * this random number generator's sequence.
 *
 * @param n the bound on the random number to be returned.  Must be
 * positive.
 * @return  a pseudorandom, uniformly distributed {@code int}
 * value between 0 (inclusive) and n (exclusive).
 * @throws IllegalArgumentException  if n is not positive.
 */

tags.name: n
tags.content: the bound on the random number to be returned.  Must be positive.
pseudorandom, uniformly distributed {@code int} value between 0 (inclusive) and n (exclusive).
tags.description: a pseudorandom, uniformly distributed int value between 0 (inclusive) and n (exclusive).

members.name: nextLong
members.javadoc: /** * Returns the next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed long * value from this random number generator's sequence. All * 264 possible {@code long} values * should be produced with (approximately) equal probability. * * @return the next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed long * value from this random number generator's sequence */

tags.content: next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed long value from this random number generator's sequence
tags.description: Returns the next pseudorandom, uniformly distributed long value from this random number generator's sequence.
